mapper.select: SELECT oa.id, oa.overtime_no AS overtimeNo, oa.emp_id AS empId, e.name AS empName, oa.overtime_type AS overtimeType, oa.start_time AS startTime, oa.end_time AS endTime, oa.hours AS hours, oa.reason AS reason, oa.status AS status, oa.create_time AS createTime FROM overtime_application oa LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON oa.emp_id = e.id WHERE oa.emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY oa.create_time DESC
